title: Anthropic's Labs Lead On Fable's Capabilities + Building AI-Native Products — With Mike Krieger
summary: Mike Krieger, head of Anthropic Labs, discusses Fable and Mythos in the context of government-forced model removals. He describes how AI-native product development accelerates workflows and explains Anthropic's safety posture as material rather than marketing-driven.
writeup: Mike Krieger, head of Anthropic Labs, discusses the lab's projects Fable and Mythos against the backdrop of government-forced model removals. He argues that AI-native product development accelerates workflows, and he frames Anthropic's safety posture as material to how the company operates rather than marketing. The conversation touches on AI agents, alignment, frontier models, and test-time compute.
